    #endregion

    #region Tooltip Component

    /// <summary>
    /// Custom tooltip component for SPDALogic items
    /// Uses IPointerEnterHandler/IPointerExitHandler with UITooltipManager for display
    /// Shows context-specific description on hover with 300ms delay
    /// </summary>
    public class SPDALogicTooltip : MonoBehaviour, IPointerEnterHandler, IPointerExitHandler
    {
        private string _deviceKey;
        private string _logicTypeName;
        private string _categoryName;
        private string _cachedTooltipText;
        private Coroutine _showCoroutine;
        private bool _isHovering;
        
        private const float HOVER_DELAY = 0.3f; // 300ms like the game

        public void Initialize(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName, string categoryName)
        {
            _deviceKey = deviceKey;
            _logicTypeName = logicTypeName;
            _categoryName = categoryName;
            _cachedTooltipText = null;
        }

        public void OnPointerEnter(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] HOVER ENTER: {_logicTypeName}");
            _isHovering = true;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
            }
            _showCoroutine = StartCoroutine(ShowTooltipAfterDelay());
        }

        public void OnPointerExit(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] HOVER EXIT: {_logicTypeName}");
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            UITooltipManager.ClearTooltip();
        }

        private IEnumerator ShowTooltipAfterDelay()
        {
            yield return new WaitForSeconds(HOVER_DELAY);
            
            if (_isHovering)
            {
                string tooltipText = GetTooltipText();
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(tooltipText))
                {
                    UITooltipManager.SetTooltip(tooltipText);
                    Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] SHOWING TOOLTIP: {_logicTypeName}");
                }
            }
        }

        private string GetTooltipText()
        {
            if (_cachedTooltipText != null)
                return _cachedTooltipText;

            var desc = StationpediaPlusPlugin.GetLogicDescription(_deviceKey, _logicTypeName);
            if (desc != null)
            {
                _cachedTooltipText = FormatTooltip(desc);
                return _cachedTooltipText;
            }
            
            // Return a default message if no description found
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(_logicTypeName);
            _cachedTooltipText = $"<b><color=#FFA500>{cleanName}</color></b>\n" +
                                 $"<color=#888888>No detailed description available yet.</color>\n" +
                                 $"<color=#666666>Device: {_deviceKey}</color>";
            return _cachedTooltipText;
        }

        private string FormatTooltip(LogicDescription desc)
        {
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(_logicTypeName);
            
            return $"<b><color=#FFA500>{cleanName}</color></b>\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</color>\n" +
                   $"<b>Type:</b> {desc.dataType}   <b>Range:</b> {desc.range}\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</color>\n" +
                   $"{desc.description}";
        }

        private string CleanLogicTypeName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            string result = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "");
            return result.Trim();
        }

        private void OnDisable()
        {
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            UITooltipManager.ClearTooltip();
        }
    }

    #endregion
}
```

```
    #endregion

    #region Harmony Patches

    /// <summary>
    /// Patch to track which device page is currently being displayed
    /// </summary>
    [HarmonyPatch(typeof(UniversalPage), "ChangeDisplay")]
    public static class UniversalPage_ChangeDisplay_Patch
    {
        [HarmonyPrefix]
        public static void Prefix(StationpediaPage page)
        {
            if (page != null)
            {
                Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] ChangeDisplay called for page: {page.Key}");
                StationpediaPlusPlugin.SetCurrentDevice(page.Key);
            }
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Patch to add tooltips to logic inserts after they are populated
    /// </summary>
    [HarmonyPatch(typeof(UniversalPage), "PopulateLogicInserts")]
    public static class UniversalPage_PopulateLogicInserts_Patch
    {
        [HarmonyPostfix]
        public static void Postfix(UniversalPage __instance, StationpediaPage page)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] PopulateLogicInserts called, page null: {page == null}");
            
            if (page == null)
            {
                Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] Page is null, skipping");
                return;
            }
            
            Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Page key: {page.Key}");
            
            if (__instance.LogicContents == null)
            {
                Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] LogicContents is null");
                return;
            }
            
            if (__instance.LogicContents.Contents == null)
            {
                Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] LogicContents.Contents is null");
                return;
            }

            string deviceKey = page.Key;
            int childCount = 0;
            int tooltipsAdded = 0;
            
            // Iterate through all SPDALogic children and add our tooltip component
            foreach (Transform child in __instance.LogicContents.Contents)
            {
                childCount++;
                SPDALogic logic = child.GetComponent<SPDALogic>();
                if (logic != null)
                {
                    // Check if we already added a tooltip
                    var existingTooltip = logic.GetComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                    if (existingTooltip == null)
                    {
                        string logicText = logic.InfoValue != null ? logic.InfoValue.text : "null";
                        Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Adding tooltip to logic: {logicText}");
                        var tooltip = logic.gameObject.AddComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                        tooltip.Initialize(deviceKey, logicText);
                        tooltipsAdded++;
                    }
                }
            }
            
            Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Processed {childCount} children, added {tooltipsAdded} tooltips");
        }
    }

    #endregion

    #region Tooltip Component

    /// <summary>
    /// Custom tooltip component for SPDALogic items
    /// Uses IPointerEnterHandler/IPointerExitHandler with UITooltipManager for display
    /// Shows context-specific description on hover with 300ms delay
    /// </summary>
    public class SPDALogicTooltip : MonoBehaviour, IPointerEnterHandler, IPointerExitHandler
    {
        private string _deviceKey;
        private string _logicTypeName;
        private string _cachedTooltipText;
        private Coroutine _showCoroutine;
        private bool _isHovering;
        
        private const float HOVER_DELAY = 0.3f; // 300ms like the game

        public void Initialize(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName)
        {
            _deviceKey = deviceKey;
            _logicTypeName = logicTypeName;
            _cachedTooltipText = null;
            Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Initialized tooltip for {logicTypeName} on device {deviceKey}");
        }

        public void OnPointerEnter(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            _isHovering = true;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
            }
            _showCoroutine = StartCoroutine(ShowTooltipAfterDelay());
        }

        public void OnPointerExit(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            UITooltipManager.ClearTooltip();
        }

        private IEnumerator ShowTooltipAfterDelay()
        {
            yield return new WaitForSeconds(HOVER_DELAY);
            
            if (_isHovering)
            {
                string tooltipText = GetTooltipText();
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(tooltipText))
                {
                    UITooltipManager.SetTooltip(tooltipText);
                    Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Showing tooltip: {tooltipText.Substring(0, Math.Min(50, tooltipText.Length))}...");
                }
            }
        }

        private string GetTooltipText()
        {
            if (_cachedTooltipText != null)
                return _cachedTooltipText;

            var desc = StationpediaPlusPlugin.GetLogicDescription(_deviceKey, _logicTypeName);
            if (desc != null)
            {
                _cachedTooltipText = FormatTooltip(desc);
                return _cachedTooltipText;
            }
            
            return null;
        }

        private string FormatTooltip(LogicDescription desc)
        {
            // Format like the aimee.md table style
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(_logicTypeName);
            
            return $"<b><color=#FFA500>{cleanName}</color></b>\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</color>\n" +
                   $"<b>Type:</b> {desc.dataType}   <b>Range:</b> {desc.range}\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</color>\n" +
                   $"{desc.description}";
        }

        private string CleanLogicTypeName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            string result = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "");
            return result.Trim();
        }

        private void OnDisable()
        {
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            UITooltipManager.ClearTooltip();
        }
    }

    #endregion
}

using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using StationeersMods.Interface;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UI.Tooltips;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace StationpediaPlus
{
    /// <summary>
    /// StationpediaPlus - Entry point for mod loading
    /// Creates a GameObject with the actual MonoBehaviour component
    /// </summary>
    public class StationpediaPlusPlugin : ModBehaviour
    {
        public static Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions> DeviceDatabase { get; private set; }
        public static Dictionary<string, string> GenericDescriptions { get; private set; }

        public override void OnLoaded(ContentHandler contentHandler)
        {
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] OnLoaded called - starting initialization...");
            
            // Load descriptions from JSON file
            LoadDescriptions();
            
            // Create a persistent GameObject for our MonoBehaviour
            var go = new GameObject("StationpediaPlus Monitor");
            UnityEngine.Object.DontDestroyOnLoad(go);
            var monitor = go.AddComponent<StationpediaMonitor>();
            
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] Monitor component added to GameObject");
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] Mod loaded successfully!");
        }

        private void LoadDescriptions()
        {
            DeviceDatabase = new Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions>();
            GenericDescriptions = new Dictionary<string, string>();
            
            try
            {
                // Find the mod directory
                string modPath = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
                string jsonPath = Path.Combine(modPath, "descriptions.json");
                
                if (File.Exists(jsonPath))
                {
                    string json = File.ReadAllText(jsonPath);
                    var data = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<DescriptionsRoot>(json);
                    
                    if (data?.devices != null)
                    {
                        foreach (var device in data.devices)
                        {
                            DeviceDatabase[device.deviceKey] = device;
                            Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded descriptions for {device.deviceKey}");
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (data?.genericDescriptions != null)
                    {
                        GenericDescriptions = data.genericDescriptions;
                    }
                    
                    Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded {DeviceDatabase.Count} device descriptions");
                }
                else
                {
                    Debug.LogWarning($"[StationpediaPlus] descriptions.json not found at {jsonPath}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Debug.LogError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error loading descriptions: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        public static LogicDescription GetLogicDescription(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName)
        {
            // Clean up the logic type name (remove Unity rich text tags)
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(logicTypeName);
            
            // Try device-specific description first
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase != null && 
                DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.logicDescriptions != null && 
                    device.logicDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            // Fall back to generic description
            if (GenericDescriptions != null && GenericDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new LogicDescription
                {
                    dataType = "Varies",
                    range = "Device-specific",
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }

        private static string CleanLogicTypeName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            string result = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "");
            return result.Trim();
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// The actual MonoBehaviour that monitors Stationpedia and adds tooltips
    /// This is attached to a GameObject so Update() gets called
    /// </summary>
    public class StationpediaMonitor : MonoBehaviour
    {
        private string _lastPageKey = "";
        private bool _initialized = false;
        private float _nextCheckTime = 0f;
        private const float CHECK_INTERVAL = 0.1f;

        private void Awake()
        {
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] StationpediaMonitor Awake() called");
        }

        private void Start()
        {
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] StationpediaMonitor Start() called - ready to monitor!");
        }

        private void Update()
        {
            // Throttle checks
            if (Time.time < _nextCheckTime)
            {
                return;
            }
            _nextCheckTime = Time.time + CHECK_INTERVAL;

            // Wait until Stationpedia.Instance exists
            if (Stationpedia.Instance == null)
            {
                return;
            }

            if (!_initialized)
            {
                _initialized = true;
                Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] Stationpedia.Instance found! Now monitoring for page changes.");
            }

            // Check if the Stationpedia is visible/active
            if (!Stationpedia.Instance.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
            {
                _lastPageKey = "";
                return;
            }

            // Get current page key
            string currentPageKey = Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey;
            
            // If page changed, add tooltips
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentPageKey) && currentPageKey != _lastPageKey)
            {
                Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Page changed to: {currentPageKey}");
                _lastPageKey = currentPageKey;
                
                // Start coroutine to add tooltips after a short delay
                StartCoroutine(AddTooltipsAfterDelay(currentPageKey));
            }
        }

        private IEnumerator AddTooltipsAfterDelay(string pageKey)
        {
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            
            AddTooltipsToLogicItems(pageKey);
        }

        private void AddTooltipsToLogicItems(string pageKey)
        {
            try
            {
                var universalPage = Stationpedia.Instance.UniversalPageRef;
                if (universalPage == null)
                {
                    Debug.LogWarning("[StationpediaPlus] UniversalPageRef is null");
                    return;
                }

                int totalTooltipsAdded = 0;

                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicContents, pageKey, "Logic");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicSlotContents, pageKey, "LogicSlot");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ModeContents, pageKey, "Mode");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ConnectionContents, pageKey, "Connection");

                if (totalTooltipsAdded > 0)
                {
                    Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Added {totalTooltipsAdded} tooltips for page {pageKey}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Debug.LogError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error adding tooltips: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private int AddTooltipsToCategory(StationpediaCategory category, string pageKey, string categoryName)
        {
            if (category == null || category.Contents == null)
            {
                return 0;
            }

            int added = 0;
            foreach (Transform child in category.Contents)
            {
                SPDALogic logic = child.GetComponent<SPDALogic>();
                if (logic != null && logic.InfoValue != null)
                {
                    var existingTooltip = logic.GetComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                    if (existingTooltip == null)
                    {
                        string logicName = logic.InfoValue.text;
                        var tooltip = logic.gameObject.AddComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                        tooltip.Initialize(pageKey, logicName, categoryName);
                        added++;
                    }
                }
            }
            return added;
        }
    }
```

```
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using StationeersMods.Interface;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UI.Tooltips;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace StationpediaPlus
{
    /// <summary>
    /// StationpediaPlus - Adds context-specific tooltips to Stationpedia logic types
    /// Uses a polling approach to detect when Stationpedia pages change and add tooltips
    /// This avoids Harmony patching issues by monitoring the UI directly.
    /// </summary>
    public class StationpediaPlusPlugin : ModBehaviour
    {
        public static StationpediaPlusPlugin Instance { get; private set; }
        public static Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions> DeviceDatabase { get; private set; }
        public static Dictionary<string, string> GenericDescriptions { get; private set; }
        
        private string _lastPageKey = "";
        private bool _initialized = false;
        private float _nextCheckTime = 0f;
        private const float CHECK_INTERVAL = 0.1f; // Only check every 100ms instead of every frame

        public override void OnLoaded(ContentHandler contentHandler)
        {
            Instance = this;
            
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] OnLoaded called - starting initialization...");
            
            // Load descriptions from JSON file
            LoadDescriptions();
            
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] Mod loaded successfully! Using polling approach to monitor Stationpedia.");
        }

        private void Update()
        {
            // Throttle checks to every 100ms instead of every frame (reduces CPU usage significantly)
            if (Time.time < _nextCheckTime)
            {
                return;
            }
            _nextCheckTime = Time.time + CHECK_INTERVAL;

            // Wait until Stationpedia.Instance exists
            if (Stationpedia.Instance == null)
            {
                return;
            }

            if (!_initialized)
            {
                _initialized = true;
                Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] Stationpedia.Instance found! Now monitoring for page changes.");
            }

            // Check if the Stationpedia is visible/active
            if (!Stationpedia.Instance.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
            {
                _lastPageKey = "";
                return;
            }

            // Get current page key
            string currentPageKey = Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey;
            
            // If page changed, add tooltips
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentPageKey) && currentPageKey != _lastPageKey)
            {
                Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Page changed to: {currentPageKey}");
                _lastPageKey = currentPageKey;
                
                // Start coroutine to add tooltips after a short delay (let UI settle)
                StartCoroutine(AddTooltipsAfterDelay(currentPageKey));
            }
        }

        private IEnumerator AddTooltipsAfterDelay(string pageKey)
        {
            // Wait for end of frame to ensure UI is fully populated
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame(); // Double wait for safety
            
            AddTooltipsToLogicItems(pageKey);
        }

        private void AddTooltipsToLogicItems(string pageKey)
        {
            try
            {
                var universalPage = Stationpedia.Instance.UniversalPageRef;
                if (universalPage == null)
                {
                    Debug.LogWarning("[StationpediaPlus] UniversalPageRef is null");
                    return;
                }

                int totalTooltipsAdded = 0;

                // Add tooltips to Logic Types (LogicContents)
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicContents, pageKey, "Logic");
                
                // Add tooltips to Logic Slot Types (LogicSlotContents)
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicSlotContents, pageKey, "LogicSlot");
                
                // Add tooltips to Mode Types (ModeContents)
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ModeContents, pageKey, "Mode");
                
                // Add tooltips to Connection Types (ConnectionContents)
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ConnectionContents, pageKey, "Connection");

                if (totalTooltipsAdded > 0)
                {
                    Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Added {totalTooltipsAdded} tooltips for page {pageKey}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Debug.LogError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error adding tooltips: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private int AddTooltipsToCategory(StationpediaCategory category, string pageKey, string categoryName)
        {
            if (category == null || category.Contents == null)
            {
                return 0;
            }

            int added = 0;
            foreach (Transform child in category.Contents)
            {
                SPDALogic logic = child.GetComponent<SPDALogic>();
                if (logic != null && logic.InfoValue != null)
                {
                    // Check if tooltip already exists
                    var existingTooltip = logic.GetComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                    if (existingTooltip == null)
                    {
                        string logicName = logic.InfoValue.text;
                        var tooltip = logic.gameObject.AddComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                        tooltip.Initialize(pageKey, logicName, categoryName);
                        added++;
                    }
                }
            }
            return added;
        }

        private void LoadDescriptions()
        {
            DeviceDatabase = new Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions>();
            GenericDescriptions = new Dictionary<string, string>();
            
            try
            {
                // Find the mod directory
                string modPath = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
                string jsonPath = Path.Combine(modPath, "descriptions.json");
                
                if (File.Exists(jsonPath))
                {
                    string json = File.ReadAllText(jsonPath);
                    var data = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<DescriptionsRoot>(json);
                    
                    if (data?.devices != null)
                    {
                        foreach (var device in data.devices)
                        {
                            DeviceDatabase[device.deviceKey] = device;
                            Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded descriptions for {device.deviceKey}");
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (data?.genericDescriptions != null)
                    {
                        GenericDescriptions = data.genericDescriptions;
                    }
                    
                    Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded {DeviceDatabase.Count} device descriptions");
                }
                else
                {
                    Debug.LogWarning($"[StationpediaPlus] descriptions.json not found at {jsonPath}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Debug.LogError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error loading descriptions: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        public static LogicDescription GetLogicDescription(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName)
        {
            // Clean up the logic type name (remove Unity rich text tags)
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(logicTypeName);
            
            // Try device-specific description first
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.logicDescriptions != null && 
                    device.logicDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            // Fall back to generic description
            if (GenericDescriptions != null && GenericDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new LogicDescription
                {
                    dataType = "Varies",
                    range = "Device-specific",
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }

        private static string CleanLogicTypeName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            
            // Remove Unity rich text tags like <link=LogicTypeMode><color=#...>Mode</color></link>
            // Extract just the display text
            int lastCloseTag = name.LastIndexOf('>');
            int lastOpenTag = name.LastIndexOf('<');
            
            if (lastCloseTag > lastOpenTag && lastOpenTag > 0)
            {
                // Find the text between the last > and last <
                int start = name.LastIndexOf('>', lastOpenTag - 1);
                if (start >= 0)
                {
                    return name.Substring(start + 1, lastOpenTag - start - 1);
                }
            }
            
            // Alternative: just strip all tags
            string result = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "");
            return result.Trim();
        }
    }

using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using StationeersMods.Interface;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UI.Tooltips;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace StationpediaPlus
{
    /// <summary>
    /// StationpediaPlus - Main mod class following IC10BatchUploader pattern
    /// ModBehaviour IS a MonoBehaviour, so we get Awake/Start/Update automatically
    /// when the framework attaches us to a GameObject
    /// </summary>
    public class StationpediaPlusMod : ModBehaviour
    {
        // Static reference for tooltip component access
        public static StationpediaPlusMod Instance { get; private set; }
        
        // Description databases
        public static Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions> DeviceDatabase { get; private set; }
        public static Dictionary<string, string> GenericDescriptions { get; private set; }
        
        // Page tracking
        private string _lastPageKey = "";
        private bool _stationpediaFound = false;
        private float _nextCheckTime = 0f;
        private const float CHECK_INTERVAL = 0.1f;

        // Called by StationeersLaunchPad when mod is loaded
        public override void OnLoaded(ContentHandler contentHandler)
        {
            base.OnLoaded(contentHandler);
            ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] OnLoaded called via StationeersLaunchPad");
            
            // Load descriptions from JSON file
            LoadDescriptions();
            
            ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Mod loaded successfully - waiting for Awake/Start");
        }

        // Unity lifecycle - called when component is first created
        void Awake()
        {
            try
            {
                Instance = this;
                DontDestroyOnLoad(gameObject);
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Awake() - GameObject: {gameObject.name}, Enabled: {enabled}");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error in Awake: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        // Unity lifecycle - called after Awake, when component is ready
        void Start()
        {
            ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Start() called - component is active and monitoring!");
        }

        // Unity lifecycle - called every frame
        void Update()
        {
            try
            {
                // Throttle checks to every 100ms
                if (Time.time < _nextCheckTime)
                {
                    return;
                }
                _nextCheckTime = Time.time + CHECK_INTERVAL;

                // Wait until Stationpedia.Instance exists
                if (Stationpedia.Instance == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                if (!_stationpediaFound)
                {
                    _stationpediaFound = true;
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Stationpedia.Instance found! Now monitoring for page changes.");
                }

                // Check if the Stationpedia is visible/active
                if (!Stationpedia.Instance.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
                {
                    _lastPageKey = "";
                    return;
                }

                // Get current page key
                string currentPageKey = Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey;
                
                // If page changed, add tooltips
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentPageKey) && currentPageKey != _lastPageKey)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Page changed to: {currentPageKey}");
                    _lastPageKey = currentPageKey;
                    
                    // Start coroutine to add tooltips after UI settles
                    StartCoroutine(AddTooltipsAfterDelay(currentPageKey));
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                // Don't spam errors - just log once
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error in Update: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private void LoadDescriptions()
        {
            DeviceDatabase = new Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions>();
            GenericDescriptions = new Dictionary<string, string>();
            
            try
            {
                // Find the mod directory
                string modPath = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
                string jsonPath = Path.Combine(modPath, "descriptions.json");
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Looking for descriptions at: {jsonPath}");
                
                if (File.Exists(jsonPath))
                {
                    string json = File.ReadAllText(jsonPath);
                    var data = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<DescriptionsRoot>(json);
                    
                    if (data?.devices != null)
                    {
                        foreach (var device in data.devices)
                        {
                            DeviceDatabase[device.deviceKey] = device;
                            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded descriptions for {device.deviceKey}");
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (data?.genericDescriptions != null)
                    {
                        GenericDescriptions = data.genericDescriptions;
                    }
                    
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded {DeviceDatabase.Count} device descriptions from JSON");
                }
                else
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] WARNING: descriptions.json not found at {jsonPath}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error loading descriptions: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private IEnumerator AddTooltipsAfterDelay(string pageKey)
        {
            // Wait for UI to settle
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            
            AddTooltipsToLogicItems(pageKey);
        }

        private void AddTooltipsToLogicItems(string pageKey)
        {
            try
            {
                var universalPage = Stationpedia.Instance.UniversalPageRef;
                if (universalPage == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] UniversalPageRef is null - page may not have logic items");
                    return;
                }

                int totalTooltipsAdded = 0;

                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicContents, pageKey, "Logic");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicSlotContents, pageKey, "LogicSlot");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ModeContents, pageKey, "Mode");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ConnectionContents, pageKey, "Connection");

                if (totalTooltipsAdded > 0)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Added {totalTooltipsAdded} tooltips for page {pageKey}");
                }
                else
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] No logic items found on page {pageKey}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error adding tooltips: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private int AddTooltipsToCategory(StationpediaCategory category, string pageKey, string categoryName)
        {
            if (category == null || category.Contents == null)
            {
                return 0;
            }

            int added = 0;
            foreach (Transform child in category.Contents)
            {
                SPDALogic logic = child.GetComponent<SPDALogic>();
                if (logic != null && logic.InfoValue != null)
                {
                    var existingTooltip = logic.GetComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                    if (existingTooltip == null)
                    {
                        string logicName = logic.InfoValue.text;
                        var tooltip = logic.gameObject.AddComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                        tooltip.Initialize(pageKey, logicName, categoryName);
                        added++;
                    }
                }
            }
            return added;
        }

        // Static helper for tooltip component to get descriptions
        public static LogicDescription GetLogicDescription(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName)
        {
            // Clean up the logic type name (remove Unity rich text tags)
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(logicTypeName);
            
            // Try device-specific description first
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase != null && 
                DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.logicDescriptions != null && 
                    device.logicDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            // Fall back to generic description
            if (GenericDescriptions != null && GenericDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new LogicDescription
                {
                    dataType = "Varies",
                    range = "Device-specific",
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }

        private static string CleanLogicTypeName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            string result = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "");
            return result.Trim();
        }
    }
```

- oldString:

```
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using StationeersMods.Interface;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UI.Tooltips;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace StationpediaPlus
{
    /// <summary>
    /// StationpediaPlus - Entry point for mod loading
    /// Creates a GameObject with the actual MonoBehaviour component
    /// </summary>
    public class StationpediaPlusPlugin : ModBehaviour
    {
        public static Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions> DeviceDatabase { get; private set; }
        public static Dictionary<string, string> GenericDescriptions { get; private set; }

        public override void OnLoaded(ContentHandler contentHandler)
        {
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] OnLoaded called - starting initialization...");
            
            // Load descriptions from JSON file
            LoadDescriptions();
            
            // Create a persistent GameObject for our MonoBehaviour
            var go = new GameObject("StationpediaPlus Monitor");
            UnityEngine.Object.DontDestroyOnLoad(go);
            var monitor = go.AddComponent<StationpediaMonitor>();
            
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] Monitor component added to GameObject");
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] Mod loaded successfully!");
        }

        private void LoadDescriptions()
        {
            DeviceDatabase = new Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions>();
            GenericDescriptions = new Dictionary<string, string>();
            
            try
            {
                // Find the mod directory
                string modPath = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
                string jsonPath = Path.Combine(modPath, "descriptions.json");
                
                if (File.Exists(jsonPath))
                {
                    string json = File.ReadAllText(jsonPath);
                    var data = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<DescriptionsRoot>(json);
                    
                    if (data?.devices != null)
                    {
                        foreach (var device in data.devices)
                        {
                            DeviceDatabase[device.deviceKey] = device;
                            Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded descriptions for {device.deviceKey}");
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (data?.genericDescriptions != null)
                    {
                        GenericDescriptions = data.genericDescriptions;
                    }
                    
                    Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded {DeviceDatabase.Count} device descriptions");
                }
                else
                {
                    Debug.LogWarning($"[StationpediaPlus] descriptions.json not found at {jsonPath}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Debug.LogError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error loading descriptions: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        public static LogicDescription GetLogicDescription(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName)
        {
            // Clean up the logic type name (remove Unity rich text tags)
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(logicTypeName);
            
            // Try device-specific description first
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase != null && 
                DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.logicDescriptions != null && 
                    device.logicDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            // Fall back to generic description
            if (GenericDescriptions != null && GenericDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new LogicDescription
                {
                    dataType = "Varies",
                    range = "Device-specific",
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }

        private static string CleanLogicTypeName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            string result = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "");
            return result.Trim();
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// The actual MonoBehaviour that monitors Stationpedia and adds tooltips
    /// This is attached to a GameObject so Update() gets called
    /// </summary>
    public class StationpediaMonitor : MonoBehaviour
    {
        private string _lastPageKey = "";
        private bool _initialized = false;
        private float _nextCheckTime = 0f;
        private const float CHECK_INTERVAL = 0.1f;

        private void Awake()
        {
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] StationpediaMonitor Awake() called");
        }

        private void Start()
        {
            Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] StationpediaMonitor Start() called - ready to monitor!");
        }

        private void Update()
        {
            // Throttle checks
            if (Time.time < _nextCheckTime)
            {
                return;
            }
            _nextCheckTime = Time.time + CHECK_INTERVAL;

            // Wait until Stationpedia.Instance exists
            if (Stationpedia.Instance == null)
            {
                return;
            }

            if (!_initialized)
            {
                _initialized = true;
                Debug.Log("[StationpediaPlus] Stationpedia.Instance found! Now monitoring for page changes.");
            }

            // Check if the Stationpedia is visible/active
            if (!Stationpedia.Instance.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
            {
                _lastPageKey = "";
                return;
            }

            // Get current page key
            string currentPageKey = Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey;
            
            // If page changed, add tooltips
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentPageKey) && currentPageKey != _lastPageKey)
            {
                Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Page changed to: {currentPageKey}");
                _lastPageKey = currentPageKey;
                
                // Start coroutine to add tooltips after a short delay
                StartCoroutine(AddTooltipsAfterDelay(currentPageKey));
            }
        }

        private IEnumerator AddTooltipsAfterDelay(string pageKey)
        {
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            
            AddTooltipsToLogicItems(pageKey);
        }

        private void AddTooltipsToLogicItems(string pageKey)
        {
            try
            {
                var universalPage = Stationpedia.Instance.UniversalPageRef;
                if (universalPage == null)
                {
                    Debug.LogWarning("[StationpediaPlus] UniversalPageRef is null");
                    return;
                }

                int totalTooltipsAdded = 0;

                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicContents, pageKey, "Logic");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicSlotContents, pageKey, "LogicSlot");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ModeContents, pageKey, "Mode");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ConnectionContents, pageKey, "Connection");

                if (totalTooltipsAdded > 0)
                {
                    Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] Added {totalTooltipsAdded} tooltips for page {pageKey}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Debug.LogError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error adding tooltips: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private int AddTooltipsToCategory(StationpediaCategory category, string pageKey, string categoryName)
        {
            if (category == null || category.Contents == null)
            {
                return 0;
            }

            int added = 0;
            foreach (Transform child in category.Contents)
            {
                SPDALogic logic = child.GetComponent<SPDALogic>();
                if (logic != null && logic.InfoValue != null)
                {
                    var existingTooltip = logic.GetComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                    if (existingTooltip == null)
                    {
                        string logicName = logic.InfoValue.text;
                        var tooltip = logic.gameObject.AddComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                        tooltip.Initialize(pageKey, logicName, categoryName);
                        added++;
                    }
                }
            }
            return added;
        }
    }
```

- newString:

```
    #region Tooltip Component

    /// <summary>
    /// Custom tooltip component for SPDALogic items
    /// Uses IPointerEnterHandler/IPointerExitHandler with UITooltipManager for display
    /// Shows context-specific description on hover with 300ms delay
    /// </summary>
    public class SPDALogicTooltip : MonoBehaviour, IPointerEnterHandler, IPointerExitHandler
    {
        private string _deviceKey;
        private string _logicTypeName;
        private string _categoryName;
        private string _cachedTooltipText;
        private Coroutine _showCoroutine;
        private bool _isHovering;
        
        private const float HOVER_DELAY = 0.3f; // 300ms like the game

        public void Initialize(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName, string categoryName)
        {
            _deviceKey = deviceKey;
            _logicTypeName = logicTypeName;
            _categoryName = categoryName;
            _cachedTooltipText = null;
        }

        public void OnPointerEnter(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] HOVER ENTER: {_logicTypeName}");
            _isHovering = true;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
            }
            _showCoroutine = StartCoroutine(ShowTooltipAfterDelay());
        }

        public void OnPointerExit(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] HOVER EXIT: {_logicTypeName}");
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            UITooltipManager.ClearTooltip();
        }

        private IEnumerator ShowTooltipAfterDelay()
        {
            yield return new WaitForSeconds(HOVER_DELAY);
            
            if (_isHovering)
            {
                string tooltipText = GetTooltipText();
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(tooltipText))
                {
                    UITooltipManager.SetTooltip(tooltipText);
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] SHOWING TOOLTIP: {_logicTypeName}");
                }
            }
        }

        private string GetTooltipText()
        {
            if (_cachedTooltipText != null)
                return _cachedTooltipText;

            var desc = StationpediaPlusMod.GetLogicDescription(_deviceKey, _logicTypeName);
            if (desc != null)
            {
                _cachedTooltipText = FormatTooltip(desc);
                return _cachedTooltipText;
            }
            
            // Return a default message if no description found
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(_logicTypeName);
            _cachedTooltipText = $"<b><color=#FFA500>{cleanName}</color></b>\n" +
                                 $"<color=#888888>No detailed description available yet.</color>\n" +
                                 $"<color=#666666>Device: {_deviceKey}</color>";
            return _cachedTooltipText;
        }

        private string FormatTooltip(LogicDescription desc)
        {
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(_logicTypeName);
            
            return $"<b><color=#FFA500>{cleanName}</color></b>\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</color>\n" +
                   $"<b>Type:</b> {desc.dataType}   <b>Range:</b> {desc.range}\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</color>\n" +
                   $"{desc.description}";
        }

        private string CleanLogicTypeName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            string result = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "");
            return result.Trim();
        }

        private void OnDisable()
        {
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            UITooltipManager.ClearTooltip();
        }
    }

    #endregion
}

    #region Tooltip Component

    /// <summary>
    /// Custom tooltip component for SPDALogic items
    /// Uses IPointerEnterHandler/IPointerExitHandler with UITooltipManager for display
    /// Shows context-specific description on hover with 300ms delay
    /// </summary>
    public class SPDALogicTooltip : MonoBehaviour, IPointerEnterHandler, IPointerExitHandler
    {
        private string _deviceKey;
        private string _logicTypeName;
        private string _categoryName;
        private string _cachedTooltipText;
        private Coroutine _showCoroutine;
        private bool _isHovering;
        
        private const float HOVER_DELAY = 0.3f; // 300ms like the game

        public void Initialize(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName, string categoryName)
        {
            _deviceKey = deviceKey;
            _logicTypeName = logicTypeName;
            _categoryName = categoryName;
            _cachedTooltipText = null;
        }

        public void OnPointerEnter(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] HOVER ENTER: {_logicTypeName}");
            _isHovering = true;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
            }
            _showCoroutine = StartCoroutine(ShowTooltipAfterDelay());
        }

        public void OnPointerExit(PointerEventData eventData)
        {

            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            UITooltipManager.ClearTooltip();
        }

        private IEnumerator ShowTooltipAfterDelay()
        {
            yield return new WaitForSeconds(HOVER_DELAY);
            
            if (_isHovering)
            {
                string tooltipText = GetTooltipText();
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(tooltipText))
                {
                    UITooltipManager.SetTooltip(tooltipText);
                    Debug.Log($"[StationpediaPlus] SHOWING TOOLTIP: {_logicTypeName}");
                }

        private string GetTooltipText()
        {
            if (_cachedTooltipText != null)

            var desc = StationpediaPlusPlugin.GetLogicDescription(_deviceKey, _logicTypeName);
            if (desc != null)
            {
                _cachedTooltipText = FormatTooltip(desc);
                return _cachedTooltipText;
            }
            
            // Return a default message if no description found
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(_logicTypeName);
            _cachedTooltipText = $"<b><color=#FFA500>{cleanName}</color></b>\n" +
                                 $"<color=#888888>No detailed description available yet.</color>\n" +
                                 $"<color=#666666>Device: {_deviceKey}</color>";
            return _cachedTooltipText;

                   $"<color=#888888>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</color>\n" +

}

using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using StationeersMods.Interface;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace StationpediaPlus
{
    /// <summary>
    /// StationpediaPlus - Main mod class following IC10BatchUploader pattern
    /// ModBehaviour IS a MonoBehaviour, so we get Awake/Start/Update automatically
    /// when the framework attaches us to a GameObject
    /// </summary>
    public class StationpediaPlusMod : ModBehaviour
    {
        // Static reference for tooltip component access
        public static StationpediaPlusMod Instance { get; private set; }
        
        // Description databases
        public static Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions> DeviceDatabase { get; private set; }
        public static Dictionary<string, string> GenericDescriptions { get; private set; }
        
        // Page tracking
        private string _lastPageKey = "";
        private bool _stationpediaFound = false;
        private float _nextCheckTime = 0f;
        private const float CHECK_INTERVAL = 0.1f;
        
        // Tooltip display state (shared with SPDALogicTooltip components)
        public static string CurrentTooltipText { get; set; } = "";
        public static bool ShowTooltip { get; set; } = false;
        
        // GUI styling
        private GUIStyle _tooltipStyle;
        private bool _stylesInitialized = false;
        private Texture2D _tooltipBackground;

        // Called by StationeersLaunchPad when mod is loaded
        public override void OnLoaded(ContentHandler contentHandler)
        {
            base.OnLoaded(contentHandler);
            ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] OnLoaded called via StationeersLaunchPad");
            
            // Load descriptions from JSON file
            LoadDescriptions();
            
            ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Mod loaded successfully - waiting for Awake/Start");
        }

        // Unity lifecycle - called when component is first created
        void Awake()
        {
            try
            {
                Instance = this;
                DontDestroyOnLoad(gameObject);
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Awake() - GameObject: {gameObject.name}, Enabled: {enabled}");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error in Awake: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        // Unity lifecycle - called after Awake, when component is ready
        void Start()
        {
            ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Start() called - component is active and monitoring!");
        }

        // Unity lifecycle - called every frame
        void Update()
        {
            try
            {
                // Throttle checks to every 100ms
                if (Time.time < _nextCheckTime)
                {
                    return;
                }
                _nextCheckTime = Time.time + CHECK_INTERVAL;

                // Wait until Stationpedia.Instance exists
                if (Stationpedia.Instance == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                if (!_stationpediaFound)
                {
                    _stationpediaFound = true;
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Stationpedia.Instance found! Now monitoring for page changes.");
                }

                // Check if the Stationpedia is visible/active
                if (!Stationpedia.Instance.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
                {
                    _lastPageKey = "";
                    return;
                }

                // Get current page key
                string currentPageKey = Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey;
                
                // If page changed, add tooltips
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentPageKey) && currentPageKey != _lastPageKey)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Page changed to: {currentPageKey}");
                    _lastPageKey = currentPageKey;
                    
                    // Start coroutine to add tooltips after UI settles
                    StartCoroutine(AddTooltipsAfterDelay(currentPageKey));
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                // Don't spam errors - just log once
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error in Update: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
        
        // Initialize GUI styles (must be called from OnGUI)
        private void InitializeStyles()
        {
            if (_stylesInitialized) return;
            
            // Create tooltip background texture - dark blue like Stationeers UI
            _tooltipBackground = new Texture2D(1, 1);
            _tooltipBackground.SetPixel(0, 0, new Color(0.05f, 0.1f, 0.15f, 0.95f));
            _tooltipBackground.Apply();
            
            // Create tooltip style
            _tooltipStyle = new GUIStyle(GUI.skin.box);
            _tooltipStyle.normal.background = _tooltipBackground;
            _tooltipStyle.normal.textColor = Color.white;
            _tooltipStyle.padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 8, 8);
            _tooltipStyle.wordWrap = true;
            _tooltipStyle.richText = true;
            _tooltipStyle.fontSize = 14;
            _tooltipStyle.alignment = TextAnchor.UpperLeft;
            
            _stylesInitialized = true;
        }
        
        // Render tooltip using IMGUI
        void OnGUI()
        {
            try
            {
                if (!ShowTooltip || string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentTooltipText))
                    return;
                
                if (!_stylesInitialized)
                    InitializeStyles();
                
                // Calculate tooltip size and position
                Vector2 mousePos = Event.current.mousePosition;
                GUIContent content = new GUIContent(CurrentTooltipText);
                
                // Calculate size with word wrap
                float maxWidth = 350f;
                Vector2 size = _tooltipStyle.CalcSize(content);
                if (size.x > maxWidth)
                {
                    size.x = maxWidth;
                    size.y = _tooltipStyle.CalcHeight(content, maxWidth);
                }
                
                // Add padding
                size.x += 10;
                size.y += 10;
                
                // Position tooltip near mouse, offset to bottom-right
                float xPos = mousePos.x + 15;
                float yPos = mousePos.y + 15;
                
                // Keep tooltip on screen
                if (xPos + size.x > Screen.width)
                    xPos = mousePos.x - size.x - 10;
                if (yPos + size.y > Screen.height)
                    yPos = mousePos.y - size.y - 10;
                
                // Clamp to screen bounds
                xPos = Mathf.Max(5, xPos);
                yPos = Mathf.Max(5, yPos);
                
                // Draw tooltip box
                Rect tooltipRect = new Rect(xPos, yPos, size.x, size.y);
                
                // Draw border
                GUI.color = new Color(1f, 0.5f, 0f, 0.8f); // Orange border
                GUI.Box(new Rect(tooltipRect.x - 2, tooltipRect.y - 2, tooltipRect.width + 4, tooltipRect.height + 4), "");
                GUI.color = Color.white;
                
                // Draw tooltip content
                GUI.Box(tooltipRect, CurrentTooltipText, _tooltipStyle);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                // Silently handle GUI errors
            }
        }

        private void LoadDescriptions()
        {
            DeviceDatabase = new Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions>();
            GenericDescriptions = new Dictionary<string, string>();
            
            try
            {
                // Find the mod directory
                string modPath = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
                string jsonPath = Path.Combine(modPath, "descriptions.json");
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Looking for descriptions at: {jsonPath}");
                
                if (File.Exists(jsonPath))
                {
                    string json = File.ReadAllText(jsonPath);
                    var data = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<DescriptionsRoot>(json);
                    
                    if (data?.devices != null)
                    {
                        foreach (var device in data.devices)
                        {
                            DeviceDatabase[device.deviceKey] = device;
                            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded descriptions for {device.deviceKey}");
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (data?.genericDescriptions != null)
                    {
                        GenericDescriptions = data.genericDescriptions;
                    }
                    
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded {DeviceDatabase.Count} device descriptions from JSON");
                }
                else
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] WARNING: descriptions.json not found at {jsonPath}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error loading descriptions: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private IEnumerator AddTooltipsAfterDelay(string pageKey)
        {
            // Wait for UI to settle
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            
            AddTooltipsToLogicItems(pageKey);
        }

        private void AddTooltipsToLogicItems(string pageKey)
        {
            try
            {
                var universalPage = Stationpedia.Instance.UniversalPageRef;
                if (universalPage == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] UniversalPageRef is null - page may not have logic items");
                    return;
                }

                int totalTooltipsAdded = 0;

                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicContents, pageKey, "Logic");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicSlotContents, pageKey, "LogicSlot");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ModeContents, pageKey, "Mode");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ConnectionContents, pageKey, "Connection");

                if (totalTooltipsAdded > 0)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Added {totalTooltipsAdded} tooltips for page {pageKey}");
                }
                else
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] No logic items found on page {pageKey}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error adding tooltips: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private int AddTooltipsToCategory(StationpediaCategory category, string pageKey, string categoryName)
        {
            if (category == null || category.Contents == null)
            {
                return 0;
            }

            int added = 0;
            foreach (Transform child in category.Contents)
            {
                SPDALogic logic = child.GetComponent<SPDALogic>();
                if (logic != null && logic.InfoValue != null)
                {
                    var existingTooltip = logic.GetComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                    if (existingTooltip == null)
                    {
                        string logicName = logic.InfoValue.text;
                        var tooltip = logic.gameObject.AddComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                        tooltip.Initialize(pageKey, logicName, categoryName);
                        added++;
                    }
                }
            }
            return added;
        }

        // Static helper for tooltip component to get descriptions
        public static LogicDescription GetLogicDescription(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName)
        {
            // Clean up the logic type name (remove Unity rich text tags)
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(logicTypeName);
            
            // Try device-specific description first
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase != null && 
                DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.logicDescriptions != null && 
                    device.logicDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            // Fall back to generic description
            if (GenericDescriptions != null && GenericDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new LogicDescription
                {
                    dataType = "Varies",
                    range = "Device-specific",
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }

        private static string CleanLogicTypeName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            string result = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "");
            return result.Trim();
        }
        
        void OnDestroy()
        {
            // Cleanup texture
            if (_tooltipBackground != null)
            {
                Destroy(_tooltipBackground);
            }
        }
    }
