using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using StationeersMods.Interface;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UI.Tooltips;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace StationpediaPlus
{
    /// <summary>
    /// StationpediaPlus - Main mod class following IC10BatchUploader pattern
    /// ModBehaviour IS a MonoBehaviour, so we get Awake/Start/Update automatically
    /// when the framework attaches us to a GameObject
    /// </summary>
    public class StationpediaPlusMod : ModBehaviour
    {
        // Static reference for tooltip component access
        public static StationpediaPlusMod Instance { get; private set; }
        
        // Description databases
        public static Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions> DeviceDatabase { get; private set; }
        public static Dictionary<string, string> GenericDescriptions { get; private set; }
        
        // Page tracking
        private string _lastPageKey = "";
        private bool _stationpediaFound = false;
        private float _nextCheckTime = 0f;
        private const float CHECK_INTERVAL = 0.1f;

        // Called by StationeersLaunchPad when mod is loaded
        public override void OnLoaded(ContentHandler contentHandler)
        {
            base.OnLoaded(contentHandler);
            ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] OnLoaded called via StationeersLaunchPad");
            
            // Load descriptions from JSON file
            LoadDescriptions();
            
            ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Mod loaded successfully - waiting for Awake/Start");
        }

        // Unity lifecycle - called when component is first created
        void Awake()
        {
            try
            {
                Instance = this;
                DontDestroyOnLoad(gameObject);
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Awake() - GameObject: {gameObject.name}, Enabled: {enabled}");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error in Awake: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        // Unity lifecycle - called after Awake, when component is ready
        void Start()
        {
            ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Start() called - component is active and monitoring!");
        }

        // Unity lifecycle - called every frame
        void Update()
        {
            try
            {
                // Throttle checks to every 100ms
                if (Time.time < _nextCheckTime)
                {
                    return;
                }
                _nextCheckTime = Time.time + CHECK_INTERVAL;

                // Wait until Stationpedia.Instance exists
                if (Stationpedia.Instance == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                if (!_stationpediaFound)
                {
                    _stationpediaFound = true;
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Stationpedia.Instance found! Now monitoring for page changes.");
                }

                // Check if the Stationpedia is visible/active
                if (!Stationpedia.Instance.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
                {
                    _lastPageKey = "";
                    return;
                }

                // Get current page key
                string currentPageKey = Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey;
                
                // If page changed, add tooltips
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentPageKey) && currentPageKey != _lastPageKey)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Page changed to: {currentPageKey}");
                    _lastPageKey = currentPageKey;
                    
                    // Start coroutine to add tooltips after UI settles
                    StartCoroutine(AddTooltipsAfterDelay(currentPageKey));
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                // Don't spam errors - just log once
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error in Update: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private void LoadDescriptions()
        {
            DeviceDatabase = new Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions>();
            GenericDescriptions = new Dictionary<string, string>();
            
            try
            {
                // Find the mod directory
                string modPath = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
                string jsonPath = Path.Combine(modPath, "descriptions.json");
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Looking for descriptions at: {jsonPath}");
                
                if (File.Exists(jsonPath))
                {
                    string json = File.ReadAllText(jsonPath);
                    var data = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<DescriptionsRoot>(json);
                    
                    if (data?.devices != null)
                    {
                        foreach (var device in data.devices)
                        {
                            DeviceDatabase[device.deviceKey] = device;
                            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded descriptions for {device.deviceKey}");
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (data?.genericDescriptions != null)
                    {
                        GenericDescriptions = data.genericDescriptions;
                    }
                    
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded {DeviceDatabase.Count} device descriptions from JSON");
                }
                else
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] WARNING: descriptions.json not found at {jsonPath}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error loading descriptions: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private IEnumerator AddTooltipsAfterDelay(string pageKey)
        {
            // Wait for UI to settle
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            
            AddTooltipsToLogicItems(pageKey);
        }

        private void AddTooltipsToLogicItems(string pageKey)
        {
            try
            {
                var universalPage = Stationpedia.Instance.UniversalPageRef;
                if (universalPage == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] UniversalPageRef is null - page may not have logic items");
                    return;
                }

                int totalTooltipsAdded = 0;

                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicContents, pageKey, "Logic");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicSlotContents, pageKey, "LogicSlot");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ModeContents, pageKey, "Mode");
                totalTooltipsAdded += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ConnectionContents, pageKey, "Connection");

                if (totalTooltipsAdded > 0)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Added {totalTooltipsAdded} tooltips for page {pageKey}");
                }
                else
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] No logic items found on page {pageKey}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error adding tooltips: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private int AddTooltipsToCategory(StationpediaCategory category, string pageKey, string categoryName)
        {
            if (category == null || category.Contents == null)
            {
                return 0;
            }

            int added = 0;
            foreach (Transform child in category.Contents)
            {
                SPDALogic logic = child.GetComponent<SPDALogic>();
                if (logic != null && logic.InfoValue != null)
                {
                    var existingTooltip = logic.GetComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                    if (existingTooltip == null)
                    {
                        string logicName = logic.InfoValue.text;
                        var tooltip = logic.gameObject.AddComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>();
                        tooltip.Initialize(pageKey, logicName, categoryName);
                        added++;
                    }
                }
            }
            return added;
        }

        // Static helper for tooltip component to get descriptions
        public static LogicDescription GetLogicDescription(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName)
        {
            // Clean up the logic type name (remove Unity rich text tags)
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(logicTypeName);
            
            // Try device-specific description first
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase != null && 
                DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.logicDescriptions != null && 
                    device.logicDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            // Fall back to generic description
            if (GenericDescriptions != null && GenericDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new LogicDescription
                {
                    dataType = "Varies",
                    range = "Device-specific",
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }

        private static string CleanLogicTypeName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            string result = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "");
            return result.Trim();
        }
    }
```


</details></tool-use>

- newString:

```
    #region Tooltip Component

    /// <summary>
    /// Custom tooltip component for SPDALogic items
    /// Uses IPointerEnterHandler/IPointerExitHandler with our custom IMGUI tooltip display
    /// Shows context-specific description on hover with 300ms delay
    /// </summary>
    public class SPDALogicTooltip : MonoBehaviour, IPointerEnterHandler, IPointerExitHandler
    {
        private string _deviceKey;
        private string _logicTypeName;
        private string _categoryName;
        private string _cachedTooltipText;
        private Coroutine _showCoroutine;
        private bool _isHovering;
        
        private const float HOVER_DELAY = 0.3f; // 300ms like the game

        public void Initialize(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName, string categoryName)
        {
            _deviceKey = deviceKey;
            _logicTypeName = logicTypeName;
            _categoryName = categoryName;
            _cachedTooltipText = null;
        }

        public void OnPointerEnter(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            _isHovering = true;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
            }
            _showCoroutine = StartCoroutine(ShowTooltipAfterDelay());
        }

        public void OnPointerExit(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            // Hide our custom tooltip
            StationpediaPlusMod.ShowTooltip = false;
            StationpediaPlusMod.CurrentTooltipText = "";
        }

        private IEnumerator ShowTooltipAfterDelay()
        {
            yield return new WaitForSeconds(HOVER_DELAY);
            
            if (_isHovering)
            {
                string tooltipText = GetTooltipText();
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(tooltipText))
                {
                    // Show our custom tooltip via the main mod's OnGUI
                    StationpediaPlusMod.CurrentTooltipText = tooltipText;
                    StationpediaPlusMod.ShowTooltip = true;
                }
            }
        }

        private string GetTooltipText()
        {
            if (_cachedTooltipText != null)
                return _cachedTooltipText;

            var desc = StationpediaPlusMod.GetLogicDescription(_deviceKey, _logicTypeName);
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(_logicTypeName);
            
            if (desc != null)
            {
                _cachedTooltipText = FormatTooltip(cleanName, desc);
                return _cachedTooltipText;
            }
            
            // Return a default message if no description found
            _cachedTooltipText = $"<color=#FFA500><b>{cleanName}</b></color>\n\n" +
                                 $"<color=#AAAAAA>No detailed description available yet.</color>\n" +
                                 $"<color=#666666>Device: {_deviceKey}</color>";
            return _cachedTooltipText;
        }

        private string FormatTooltip(string cleanName, LogicDescription desc)
        {
            return $"<color=#FFA500><b>{cleanName}</b></color>\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>─────────────────────</color>\n" +
                   $"<b>Type:</b> {desc.dataType}   <b>Range:</b> {desc.range}\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>─────────────────────</color>\n" +
                   $"{desc.description}";
        }

        private string CleanLogicTypeName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            string result = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "");
            return result.Trim();
        }

        private void OnDisable()
        {
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            StationpediaPlusMod.ShowTooltip = false;
            StationpediaPlusMod.CurrentTooltipText = "";
        }
    }

    #endregion
}
```

- oldString:

```
    #region Tooltip Component

    /// <summary>
    /// Custom tooltip component for SPDALogic items
    /// Uses IPointerEnterHandler/IPointerExitHandler with UITooltipManager for display
    /// Shows context-specific description on hover with 300ms delay
    /// </summary>
    public class SPDALogicTooltip : MonoBehaviour, IPointerEnterHandler, IPointerExitHandler
    {
        private string _deviceKey;
        private string _logicTypeName;
        private string _categoryName;
        private string _cachedTooltipText;
        private Coroutine _showCoroutine;
        private bool _isHovering;
        
        private const float HOVER_DELAY = 0.3f; // 300ms like the game

        public void Initialize(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName, string categoryName)
        {
            _deviceKey = deviceKey;
            _logicTypeName = logicTypeName;
            _categoryName = categoryName;
            _cachedTooltipText = null;
        }

        public void OnPointerEnter(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] HOVER ENTER: {_logicTypeName}");
            _isHovering = true;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
            }
            _showCoroutine = StartCoroutine(ShowTooltipAfterDelay());
        }

        public void OnPointerExit(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] HOVER EXIT: {_logicTypeName}");
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            UITooltipManager.ClearTooltip();
        }

        private IEnumerator ShowTooltipAfterDelay()
        {
            yield return new WaitForSeconds(HOVER_DELAY);
            
            if (_isHovering)
            {
                string tooltipText = GetTooltipText();
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(tooltipText))
                {
                    UITooltipManager.SetTooltip(tooltipText);
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] SHOWING TOOLTIP: {_logicTypeName}");
                }
            }
        }

        private string GetTooltipText()
        {
            if (_cachedTooltipText != null)
                return _cachedTooltipText;

            var desc = StationpediaPlusMod.GetLogicDescription(_deviceKey, _logicTypeName);
            if (desc != null)
            {
                _cachedTooltipText = FormatTooltip(desc);
                return _cachedTooltipText;
            }
            
            // Return a default message if no description found
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(_logicTypeName);
            _cachedTooltipText = $"<b><color=#FFA500>{cleanName}</color></b>\n" +
                                 $"<color=#888888>No detailed description available yet.</color>\n" +
                                 $"<color=#666666>Device: {_deviceKey}</color>";
            return _cachedTooltipText;
        }

        private string FormatTooltip(LogicDescription desc)
        {
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(_logicTypeName);
            
            return $"<b><color=#FFA500>{cleanName}</color></b>\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</color>\n" +
                   $"<b>Type:</b> {desc.dataType}   <b>Range:</b> {desc.range}\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</color>\n" +
                   $"{desc.description}";
        }

        private string CleanLogicTypeName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            string result = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "");
            return result.Trim();
        }

        private void OnDisable()
        {
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            UITooltipManager.ClearTooltip();
        }
    }

    #endregion
}

```
        private string GetTooltipText()
        {
            if (_cachedTooltipText != null)
                return _cachedTooltipText;

            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(_logicTypeName);
            var desc = StationpediaPlusMod.GetLogicDescription(_deviceKey, cleanName);
            
            if (desc != null)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Found description for {cleanName} on {_deviceKey}");
                _cachedTooltipText = FormatTooltip(cleanName, desc);
                return _cachedTooltipText;
            }
            
            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] No description for {cleanName} on {_deviceKey}");
            
            // Return a default message if no description found
            _cachedTooltipText = $"<color=#FFA500><b>{cleanName}</b></color>\n\n" +
                                 $"<color=#AAAAAA>No detailed description available yet.</color>\n" +
                                 $"<color=#666666>Device: {_deviceKey}</color>";
            return _cachedTooltipText;
        }
```

- oldString:

```
        private string GetTooltipText()
        {
            if (_cachedTooltipText != null)
                return _cachedTooltipText;

            var desc = StationpediaPlusMod.GetLogicDescription(_deviceKey, _logicTypeName);
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(_logicTypeName);
            
            if (desc != null)
            {
                _cachedTooltipText = FormatTooltip(cleanName, desc);
                return _cachedTooltipText;
            }
            
            // Return a default message if no description found
            _cachedTooltipText = $"<color=#FFA500><b>{cleanName}</b></color>\n\n" +
                                 $"<color=#AAAAAA>No detailed description available yet.</color>\n" +
                                 $"<color=#666666>Device: {_deviceKey}</color>";
            return _cachedTooltipText;
        }
```


</details></tool-use>

_**User (2025-12-28 01:22:51Z)**_

Terrific. This all works perfectly. I think we should compile the .json descriptions for every single device in the game. Every device should have tooltips in every section.

I see a few different types of sections:
Mode
Logic
Logic Slots
Slots
Versions
Connections

I want context sensitive tooltips for every single object in the game that has these categoires on their stationpedia page.

There is also the category of "Internal Memory". I would like it if we had a tooltip for every yellow-texted item in those tables. So for instance, the Medium Satellite Dish has the TraderInstruction.WriteTraderData Opcodes. So wehn I hover over Write_Index it should explain what that does. When I hover over Op_Code it should explain that too. I also should get a hover for when I hover over Traderinstruction.StrongestContactSignalData or Traderinstruction.StrongestContactIdHash. The hover should explain what kinds of information in gerenal each opcode will provide. 

Please add the capability for our hovers in the mod to add this information and then please remake our agentic instructions and batching. <tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="create_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **create_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- content:

```
## Plan: StationpediaPlus Comprehensive Expansion

Expand StationpediaPlus to provide context-sensitive hover tooltips for ALL 694+ programmable devices across 7 category types: Logic, LogicSlot, Mode, Connection, Slots, StructureVersions, and Internal Memory (Instructions). Determine which descriptions should be generic vs device-specific, then use 8 parallel agents to document all devices systematically.

---

## Progress Tracker

| Phase | Status | Description |
|-------|--------|-------------|
| 1 | ⬜ Not Started | Expand Data Model & JSON Schema |
| 2 | ⬜ Not Started | Hook Remaining Stationpedia Categories |
| 3 | ⬜ Not Started | Test Working Prototype |
| 4 | ⬜ Not Started | Extract & Categorize All Device Keys |
| 5 | ⬜ Not Started | Analyze Generic vs Device-Specific Types |
| 6 | ⬜ Not Started | Create Generic Descriptions |
| 7 | ⬜ Not Started | Create Batch Assignment System |
| 8 | ⬜ Not Started | Document Agent Workflow Instructions |
| 9 | ⬜ Not Started | Execute Batch Processing (8 Agents) |
| 10 | ⬜ Not Started | Final Integration & Validation |

**Current Phase**: 1  
**Last Updated**: 2025-12-27

---

## Phases

### Phase 1: Expand Data Model & JSON Schema
- **Objective:** Update the C# data classes and JSON format to support all 7 category types
- **Files/Functions to Modify/Create:**
  - `StationpediaPlus.cs` - Add new dictionary properties to `DeviceDescriptions` class
  - `descriptions.json` - Update schema with new category sections
- **Tests to Write:**
  - Test JSON loads with new schema without errors
  - Test each new dictionary can be accessed
- **Steps:**
  1. Add `slotDescriptions`, `versionDescriptions`, `memoryDescriptions` dictionaries to `DeviceDescriptions` class
  2. Update `GetLogicDescription()` to handle new category types or create separate methods
  3. Create example JSON entries demonstrating new schema
  4. Test JSON loading works correctly

---

### Phase 2: Hook Remaining Stationpedia Categories
- **Objective:** Attach tooltip components to Slots, Versions, and Memory/Instructions UI elements
- **Files/Functions to Modify/Create:**
  - `StationpediaPlus.cs` - Add methods: `AddTooltipsToSlots()`, `AddTooltipsToVersions()`, `AddTooltipsToMemory()`
- **Tests to Write:**
  - Test tooltips appear on SPDASlot elements
  - Test tooltips appear on SPDAVersion elements  
  - Test tooltips appear on SPDAGeneric (Memory) elements
- **Steps:**
  1. Create `AddTooltipsToSlots()` method targeting `SlotContents` category
  2. Create `AddTooltipsToVersions()` method targeting `StructureVersionContents` category
  3. Create `AddTooltipsToMemory()` method targeting `LogicInstructions` category
  4. Update `Update()` to call new methods on page change
  5. Create appropriate tooltip component classes if needed

---

### Phase 3: Test Working Prototype
- **Objective:** Verify all 7 category types display tooltips correctly before batching
- **Files/Functions to Modify/Create:**
  - `descriptions.json` - Add test entries for each category type
- **Tests to Write:**
  - Manual test: Logic tooltips (existing - verify still works)
  - Manual test: LogicSlot tooltips (existing - verify still works)
  - Manual test: Mode tooltips (existing - verify still works)
  - Manual test: Connection tooltips (existing - verify still works)
  - Manual test: Slot tooltips (NEW)
  - Manual test: Version tooltips (NEW)
  - Manual test: Memory/Instruction tooltips (NEW)
- **Steps:**
  1. Add test device with all 7 category types to JSON
  2. Build and deploy mod
  3. Open Stationpedia to test device page
  4. Verify each category type shows tooltip on hover
  5. Document any issues and fix before proceeding

---

### Phase 4: Extract & Categorize All Device Keys
- **Objective:** Build complete list of all 694+ device page keys and what categories each has
- **Files/Functions to Modify/Create:**
  - `plans/device-inventory.csv` - Master list of all devices
  - PowerShell extraction script
- **Tests to Write:**
  - Verify device count matches expected ~694
  - Verify categorization is correct for sample devices
- **Steps:**
  1. Extract all page keys from Stationpedia.json
  2. Cross-reference with decompiled code to determine categories per device
  3. Flag devices with Memory/Instructions (18 known)
  4. Output CSV: PageKey, DisplayName, HasLogic, HasLogicSlot, HasMode, HasConnection, HasSlots, HasVersions, HasMemory

---

### Phase 5: Analyze Generic vs Device-Specific Types
- **Objective:** Determine which Logic/Slot/Mode/etc types should have generic descriptions vs device-specific
- **Files/Functions to Modify/Create:**
  - `plans/generic-types-analysis.md` - Analysis document
- **Tests to Write:**
  - N/A (research phase)
- **Steps:**
  1. Extract all unique LogicType values used across devices
  2. Count how many devices use each LogicType
  3. Categorize as GENERIC (same meaning everywhere) or DEVICE-SPECIFIC (meaning varies)
  4. Examples of GENERIC: Power, RequiredPower, ReferenceId, On, Error, Lock
  5. Examples of DEVICE-SPECIFIC: Setting, Ratio, Output, Input (meaning depends on device)
  6. Repeat for LogicSlotType, Mode enums, Connection types
  7. Create final list of types that need generic descriptions

---

### Phase 6: Create Generic Descriptions
- **Objective:** Write generic descriptions for all universal types identified in Phase 5
- **Files/Functions to Modify/Create:**
  - `descriptions.json` - Populate `genericDescriptions` section
- **Tests to Write:**
  - Test generic descriptions load correctly
  - Test fallback to generic works when device-specific not found
- **Steps:**
  1. Write descriptions for all GENERIC LogicTypes (est. 20-40 types)
  2. Write descriptions for all GENERIC LogicSlotTypes
  3. Write descriptions for all GENERIC Mode values
  4. Write descriptions for all GENERIC Connection types
  5. Test fallback mechanism in mod

---

### Phase 7: Create Batch Assignment System
- **Objective:** Divide remaining device-specific work into 8 equal batches
- **Files/Functions to Modify/Create:**
  - `plans/batch-1.json` through `plans/batch-8.json` - Device assignments
  - `plans/batch-template.md` - Template for agent instructions
- **Tests to Write:**
  - Verify all 694 devices assigned to exactly one batch
  - Verify batches are roughly equal size
- **Steps:**
  1. Remove devices that only need generic descriptions (if any)
  2. Divide remaining devices into 8 batches (~87 devices each)
  3. For each batch, list: PageKey, DisplayName, Categories to document
  4. Create JSON template showing expected output format per device

---

### Phase 8: Document Agent Workflow Instructions
- **Objective:** Create comprehensive instructions for batch documentation agents
- **Files/Functions to Modify/Create:**
  - `plans/agent-instructions.md` - Complete agent workflow guide
- **Tests to Write:**
  - N/A (documentation)
- **Steps:**
  1. Document how to find device info in decompiled code
  2. Document JSON format for each category type
  3. Provide examples of good descriptions (brief, 1-3 sentences)
  4. List all 18 memory-enabled devices and their instruction types
  5. Document opcode lookup process for memory instructions
  6. Include common pitfalls and quality guidelines

---

### Phase 9: Execute Batch Processing (8 Agents)
- **Objective:** Run 8 parallel agents to document all devices
- **Files/Functions to Modify/Create:**
  - `descriptions-batch-1.json` through `descriptions-batch-8.json` - Agent outputs
- **Tests to Write:**
  - Validate each batch output against JSON schema
  - Verify all assigned devices are documented
- **Steps:**
  1. Launch Agent 1 with batch-1.json assignment
  2. Launch Agent 2 with batch-2.json assignment
  3. ... (repeat for all 8 agents)
  4. Collect and validate outputs
  5. Address any validation errors

---

### Phase 10: Final Integration & Validation
- **Objective:** Merge all batch outputs and verify complete coverage
- **Files/Functions to Modify/Create:**
  - `descriptions.json` - Final merged file
  - `README.md` - Mod documentation
- **Tests to Write:**
  - Test merged JSON loads without errors
  - Test sample devices from each batch
  - Test all 18 memory-enabled devices show instruction tooltips
- **Steps:**
  1. Merge 8 batch outputs into single descriptions.json
  2. Run validation to check all devices covered
  3. Test representative devices in-game
  4. Create user documentation
  5. Package final mod release

---

## Open Questions (Resolved)

| Question | Decision |
|----------|----------|
| Batch size strategy? | ✅ 8 equal batches |
| Description depth? | ✅ Brief, 1-3 sentences |
| Generic vs device-specific? | ✅ Phase 5 will analyze and determine |
| Memory instructions scope? | ✅ ALL opcodes for ALL 18 devices |
| Prototype first? | ✅ Yes, Phase 3 tests before batching |

---

## Notes

- **Memory-enabled devices (18)**: Fabricators (multiple), Logic Sorter, Satellite Dish, Occupancy Sensor, Rocket Avionics, Celestial Tracking components
- **Instruction types**: PrinterInstruction, SorterInstruction, TraderInstruction, OccupancyInstruction, RocketAvionicsInstruction, CelestialTracking

```
You are implementing Phase 1 of the StationpediaPlus expansion plan.

## Objective
Update the C# data classes and JSON format to support all 7 category types for Stationpedia tooltips: Logic, LogicSlot, Mode, Connection, Slots, Versions, and Memory (Instructions).

## Current State
The mod is located at: `C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaPlus\mod\`
- Main code file: `StationpediaPlus.cs`
- Data file: `descriptions.json`

The current `DeviceDescriptions` class only has `logicDescriptions` dictionary. We need to expand it.

## Tasks

### 1. Update DeviceDescriptions class in StationpediaPlus.cs
Add these new dictionary properties:
- `slotDescriptions` - Dictionary<string, string> for slot type descriptions (key = slot name like "Battery", "GasCanister")
- `versionDescriptions` - Dictionary<string, string> for structure version descriptions (key = version name like "Tier One")
- `memoryDescriptions` - Dictionary<string, string> for memory instruction/opcode descriptions (key = instruction name like "ExecuteRecipe", "WriteTraderData")

Note: `logicDescriptions` already handles Logic, LogicSlot, Mode, and Connection since they all use the SPDALogic prefab with the same structure.

### 2. Update GenericDescriptions class (or create if not exists)
Ensure genericDescriptions supports all category types with the same dictionaries.

### 3. Create helper methods for new category lookups
Add methods like:
- `GetSlotDescription(string deviceKey, string slotName)` - returns description for slot
- `GetVersionDescription(string deviceKey, string versionName)` - returns description for version
- `GetMemoryDescription(string deviceKey, string instructionName)` - returns description for memory instruction

Each should fall back to generic descriptions if device-specific not found.

### 4. Update descriptions.json with example entries
Add example entries demonstrating the new schema. Use the existing devices (ThingRobot, ThingStructureAdvancedFurnace, ThingStructureSatelliteDish) and add the new category types where applicable.

Example expanded device entry structure:
```json
{
  "deviceKey": "ThingStructureSatelliteDish",
  "displayName": "Satellite Dish",
  "logicDescriptions": { ... },
  "memoryDescriptions": {
    "WriteTraderData": "Writes trading parameters to the satellite dish memory for automated trader operations.",
    "StrongestContactIdHash": "Returns the ID hash of the strongest signal contact detected by the dish."
  }
}
```

## Important Notes
- Follow strict TDD: Read existing code first, understand the pattern, then make minimal changes
- The mod uses Newtonsoft.Json for serialization
- Ensure all new properties have `[JsonProperty]` attributes if needed
- Test that the JSON still loads without errors after changes
- Do NOT modify the tooltip display logic yet (that's Phase 2)

## Expected Deliverables
1. Updated `DeviceDescriptions` class with new dictionaries
2. Updated or created generic descriptions structure
3. New helper methods for lookups
4. Updated `descriptions.json` with example entries for all category types

Work autonomously. When complete, report back with:
- Summary of changes made
- List of files modified
- Any issues encountered
```


</details></tool-use>

- newString:

```
    #region Data Classes
    
    [Serializable]
    public class DescriptionsRoot
    {
        public string version;
        public List<DeviceDescriptions> devices;
        public GenericDescriptionsData genericDescriptions;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class DeviceDescriptions
    {
        public string deviceKey;
        public string displayName;
        // Logic, LogicSlot, Mode, Connection all use the same SPDALogic prefab
        public Dictionary<string, LogicDescription> logicDescriptions;
        // Slot descriptions for SPDASlot items
        public Dictionary<string, SlotDescription> slotDescriptions;
        // Version/Tier descriptions for SPDAVersion items
        public Dictionary<string, VersionDescription> versionDescriptions;
        // Memory instruction/opcode descriptions for SPDAGeneric items
        public Dictionary<string, MemoryDescription> memoryDescriptions;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class LogicDescription
    {
        public string dataType;
        public string range;
        public string description;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class SlotDescription
    {
        public string slotType;      // e.g., "Battery", "GasCanister", "ProgrammableChip"
        public string description;   // What this slot is used for on this device
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class VersionDescription
    {
        public string description;   // What changes in this version/tier
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class MemoryDescription
    {
        public string opCode;        // The instruction name (e.g., "ExecuteRecipe", "WriteTraderData")
        public string parameters;    // Expected parameters (e.g., "address, value")
        public string description;   // What this instruction does
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class GenericDescriptionsData
    {
        // Generic logic type descriptions (for Logic, LogicSlot, Mode, Connection)
        public Dictionary<string, string> logic;
        // Generic slot type descriptions
        public Dictionary<string, string> slots;
        // Generic version descriptions
        public Dictionary<string, string> versions;
        // Generic memory instruction descriptions
        public Dictionary<string, string> memory;
    }
    
    #endregion
```

    #region Data Classes
    
    [Serializable]
    public class DescriptionsRoot
    {
        public string version;
        public List<DeviceDescriptions> devices;
        public Dictionary<string, string> genericDescriptions;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class DeviceDescriptions
    {
        public string deviceKey;
        public string displayName;
        public Dictionary<string, LogicDescription> logicDescriptions;
        public Dictionary<string, ModeDescription> modeDescriptions;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class LogicDescription
    {
        public string dataType;
        public string range;
        public string description;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class ModeDescription
    {
        public int value;
        public string name;
        public string description;
    }
    
    #endregion
```


</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- filePath: `C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaPlus\mod\StationpediaPlus.cs`
- newString:

```
        private void LoadDescriptions()
        {
            DeviceDatabase = new Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions>();
            GenericDescriptions = new GenericDescriptionsData();
            
            try
            {
                // Find the mod directory
                string modPath = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
                string jsonPath = Path.Combine(modPath, "descriptions.json");
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Looking for descriptions at: {jsonPath}");
                
                if (File.Exists(jsonPath))
                {
                    string json = File.ReadAllText(jsonPath);
                    var data = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<DescriptionsRoot>(json);
                    
                    if (data?.devices != null)
                    {
                        foreach (var device in data.devices)
                        {
                            DeviceDatabase[device.deviceKey] = device;
                            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded descriptions for {device.deviceKey}");
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (data?.genericDescriptions != null)
                    {
                        GenericDescriptions = data.genericDescriptions;
                        int logicCount = GenericDescriptions.logic?.Count ?? 0;
                        int slotCount = GenericDescriptions.slots?.Count ?? 0;
                        int memoryCount = GenericDescriptions.memory?.Count ?? 0;
                        ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded generic descriptions: {logicCount} logic, {slotCount} slots, {memoryCount} memory");
                    }
                    
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded {DeviceDatabase.Count} device descriptions from JSON");
                }
                else
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] WARNING: descriptions.json not found at {jsonPath}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error loading descriptions: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```

- oldString:

```
        private void LoadDescriptions()
        {
            DeviceDatabase = new Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions>();
            GenericDescriptions = new Dictionary<string, string>();
            
            try
            {
                // Find the mod directory
                string modPath = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
                string jsonPath = Path.Combine(modPath, "descriptions.json");
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Looking for descriptions at: {jsonPath}");
                
                if (File.Exists(jsonPath))
                {
                    string json = File.ReadAllText(jsonPath);
                    var data = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<DescriptionsRoot>(json);
                    
                    if (data?.devices != null)
                    {
                        foreach (var device in data.devices)
                        {
                            DeviceDatabase[device.deviceKey] = device;
                            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded descriptions for {device.deviceKey}");
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (data?.genericDescriptions != null)
                    {
                        GenericDescriptions = data.genericDescriptions;
                    }
                    
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded {DeviceDatabase.Count} device descriptions from JSON");
                }
                else
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] WARNING: descriptions.json not found at {jsonPath}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.PrintError($"[StationpediaPlus] Error loading descriptions: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- filePath: `C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaPlus\mod\StationpediaPlus.cs`
- newString:

```
        // Static helper for tooltip component to get descriptions
        public static LogicDescription GetLogicDescription(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName)
        {
            // Clean up the logic type name (remove Unity rich text tags)
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(logicTypeName);
            
            // Try device-specific description first
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase != null && 
                DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.logicDescriptions != null && 
                    device.logicDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            // Fall back to generic description
            if (GenericDescriptions?.logic != null && GenericDescriptions.logic.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new LogicDescription
                {
                    dataType = "Varies",
                    range = "Device-specific",
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }

        // Static helper for slot descriptions
        public static SlotDescription GetSlotDescription(string deviceKey, string slotName)
        {
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(slotName);
            
            // Try device-specific description first
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase != null && 
                DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.slotDescriptions != null && 
                    device.slotDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            // Fall back to generic description
            if (GenericDescriptions?.slots != null && GenericDescriptions.slots.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new SlotDescription
                {
                    slotType = cleanName,
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }

        // Static helper for version descriptions
        public static VersionDescription GetVersionDescription(string deviceKey, string versionName)
        {
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(versionName);
            
            // Try device-specific description first
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase != null && 
                DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.versionDescriptions != null && 
                    device.versionDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            // Fall back to generic description
            if (GenericDescriptions?.versions != null && GenericDescriptions.versions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new VersionDescription
                {
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }

        // Static helper for memory instruction descriptions
        public static MemoryDescription GetMemoryDescription(string deviceKey, string instructionName)
        {
            string cleanName = CleanLogicTypeName(instructionName);
            
            // Try device-specific description first
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase != null && 
                DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.memoryDescriptions != null && 
                    device.memoryDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            // Fall back to generic description
            if (GenericDescriptions?.memory != null && GenericDescriptions.memory.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new MemoryDescription
                {
                    opCode = cleanName,
                    parameters = "",
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }
```

{
  "version": "2.0.0",
  "devices": [
    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingRobot",
      "displayName": "Aimee (Mining Robot)",
      "logicDescriptions": {
        "Mode": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0-6",
          "description": "Controls Aimee's autonomous behavior:\n• 0 = None (idle, brakes applied)\n• 1 = Follow (follows nearest player)\n• 2 = MoveToTarget (direct path to TargetX/Y/Z)\n• 3 = Roam (wander and auto-mine ore)\n• 4 = Unload (deposit ore to nearby input)\n• 5 = PathToTarget (pathfind to TargetX/Y/Z)\n• 6 = StorageFull (auto-set when full)"
        },
        "TargetX": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "World coords (m)",
          "description": "Target X coordinate for MoveToTarget (Mode 2) and PathToTarget (Mode 5). Set this along with TargetY and TargetZ to direct Aimee to a specific location."
        },
        "TargetY": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "World coords (m)",
          "description": "Target Y coordinate (altitude). Used with MoveToTarget and PathToTarget modes. Y is vertical height in the world."
        },
        "TargetZ": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "World coords (m)",
          "description": "Target Z coordinate for navigation. Combined with TargetX and TargetY to form the destination point."
        },
        "PositionX": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "World coords (m)",
          "description": "Aimee's current X position in world coordinates. Use for tracking location or calculating distance to targets."
        },
        "PositionY": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "World coords (m)",
          "description": "Aimee's current Y position (altitude). Useful for determining if robot is above or below ground level."
        },
        "PositionZ": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "World coords (m)",
          "description": "Aimee's current Z position in world coordinates."
        },
        "VelocityMagnitude": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ m/s",
          "description": "Aimee's total speed. Returns 0 when stationary. Use to detect if robot is stuck (< 0.1 for extended time)."
        },
        "VelocityRelativeX": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "m/s",
          "description": "Velocity along Aimee's local X axis (sideways movement relative to robot facing)."
        },
        "VelocityRelativeY": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "m/s",
          "description": "Velocity along Aimee's local Y axis (vertical movement relative to robot)."
        },
        "VelocityRelativeZ": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "m/s",
          "description": "Velocity along Aimee's local Z axis (forward/backward relative to robot facing)."
        },
        "Orientation": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-360°",
          "description": "Aimee's heading/yaw orientation in degrees. 0 = North, 90 = East, 180 = South, 270 = West."
        },
        "MineablesInQueue": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "description": "Currently broken & deprecated. DO NOT USE"
        },
        "MineablesInVicinity": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "description": "Number of minable ore deposits within 32-block range. Use to check if area has ore before sending Aimee to mine."
        },
        "ForwardX": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "-1 to 1",
          "description": "X component of Aimee's forward direction vector. Part of the unit vector indicating which way the robot is facing."
        },
        "ForwardY": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "-1 to 1",
          "description": "Y component of forward direction vector. Typically near 0 unless robot is tilted."
        },
        "ForwardZ": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "-1 to 1",
          "description": "Z component of forward direction vector."
        },
        "Power": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Returns 1 if Aimee has battery power, 0 if battery is dead or missing."
        },
        "On": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Power state. Write 1 to turn on, 0 to turn off. Must have battery to operate."
        },
        "Error": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Returns 1 if Aimee has an error (no chip, chip compilation error, or stuck). Check this to diagnose problems."
        },
        "Lock": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Lock state. Write 1 to lock (prevents player interaction), 0 to unlock."
        },
        "Activate": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Activation state. Similar to On but used for triggering specific actions."
        }
      },
      "slotDescriptions": {
        "Battery": {
          "slotType": "Battery",
          "description": "Powers Aimee's movement and mining operations. Use a large battery for extended autonomous operation."
        },
        "ProgrammableChip": {
          "slotType": "ProgrammableChip",
          "description": "IC10 chip slot for custom automation scripts. Program navigation, mining patterns, and unload logic here."
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingStructureAdvancedFurnace",
      "displayName": "Advanced Furnace",
      "logicDescriptions": {
        "Mode": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0-3",
          "description": "Furnace operation mode:\n• 0 = Idle (no processing)\n• 1 = Smelt (process ores → ingots)\n• 2 = Alloy (combine ingots, needs upgrade)\n• 3 = Incinerate (destroy items, generate heat)"
        },
        "SettingInput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-10 L/tick",
          "description": "Input flow rate in liters per tick. Controls how much gas/liquid is drawn FROM the input pipe network INTO the furnace chamber. Higher = faster input."
        },
        "SettingOutput": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-10 L/tick",
          "description": "Output flow rate in liters per tick. Controls how much gas is pushed FROM the furnace chamber TO the output pipe network. Higher = faster exhaust."
        },
        "Setting": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-10 L/tick",
          "description": "Same as SettingOutput. Target output flow rate for gas exhaust from the furnace."
        },
        "Temperature": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ K",
          "description": "Current internal temperature of the furnace in Kelvin. Must reach recipe temperature to smelt. ~1500K for most ores."
        },
        "Pressure": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ kPa",
          "description": "Internal pressure of furnace chamber. High pressure can damage the furnace. Vent excess gas to control."
        },
        "Power": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Returns 1 if furnace is powered, 0 if no power. Requires cable connection."
        },
        "On": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Power state. Write 1 to turn on, 0 to turn off."
        },
        "Error": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Returns 1 if furnace has an error (overpressure, overtemp, or no fuel)."
        },
        "Activate": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Activation state. Returns 1 if furnace is actively processing."
        },
        "Combustion": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-100%",
          "description": "Current combustion rate. Higher values = faster heating. Depends on fuel mixture and pressure."
        },
        "RequiredPower": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",
          "description": "Power currently required by the furnace. Scales with SettingInput + SettingOutput usage."
        },
        "Lock": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Lock state. Write 1 to prevent player access to controls."
        },
        "RatioOxygen": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Ratio of oxygen in furnace atmosphere. Needed for combustion."
        },
        "RatioVolatiles": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Ratio of volatiles (fuel) in furnace. Burns with oxygen to generate heat."
        },
        "TotalMoles": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ mol",
          "description": "Total moles of gas inside the furnace chamber."
        }
      },
      "slotDescriptions": {
        "Import": {
          "slotType": "Import",
          "description": "Input slot for raw ores and items to be processed. Insert ores here for smelting or items for incineration."
        },
        "Export": {
          "slotType": "Export",
          "description": "Output slot where finished ingots appear after smelting. Use a stacker or chute to automate collection."
        }
      },
      "versionDescriptions": {
        "Tier One": {
          "description": "Basic furnace. Lower efficiency but cheaper to build. Good for early game smelting."
        },
        "Tier Two": {
          "description": "Improved efficiency and speed. Reduced material and energy costs per smelt operation."
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingStructureSatelliteDish",
      "displayName": "Satellite Dish (Medium)",
      "logicDescriptions": {
        "Mode": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "N/A",
          "description": "Satellite dish does not use Mode. Control via Horizontal/Vertical angles and Setting (power)."
        },
        "Setting": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0-5000 W",
          "description": "Transmission power in watts. Higher power = longer range but more electricity used. Must exceed trader's MinimumWattsToContact."
        },
        "Horizontal": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-360°",
          "description": "Horizontal angle (azimuth) in degrees. Controls dish rotation. 0° = reference direction, rotates clockwise."
        },
        "Vertical": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-90°",
          "description": "Vertical angle (elevation) in degrees. 0° = horizontal, 90° = straight up. Point at sky to find traders."
        },
        "HorizontalRatio": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Horizontal position as ratio. 0 = 0°, 0.5 = 180°, 1 = 360°. Alternative to degree-based control."
        },
        "VerticalRatio": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Vertical position as ratio. 0 = 0° (horizontal), 1 = 90° (straight up)."
        },
        "SignalStrength": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-180°",
          "description": "Angular offset from strongest contact in degrees. Lower = better alignment. -1 if no signal or resolving."
        },
        "SignalID": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "ReferenceId",
          "description": "Reference ID of the strongest detected trader contact. Returns -1 if no contact found. Use with db instruction."
        },
        "MinimumWattsToContact": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",
          "description": "Minimum watts required to establish contact with strongest signal. Your Setting must exceed this value."
        },
        "WattsReachingContact": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",
          "description": "Actual watts reaching the contact after distance/alignment losses. Must exceed MinimumWattsToContact for communication."
        },
        "InterrogationProgress": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1 or -1",
          "description": "Contact interrogation progress. 0-1 during interrogation, 1 when complete, -1 if no contact. Interrogation reveals trader inventory."
        },
        "ContactTypeId": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "Hash",
          "description": "Hash ID of the trader type at strongest contact. Identifies what kind of trader (Merchant, etc)."
        },
        "Idle": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Returns 1 if dish motors have stopped moving, 0 if still rotating to target position."
        },
        "TargetPadIndex": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "description": "Index of landing pad to direct incoming traders to. Set via IC10 to route traders to specific pads."
        },
        "BestContactFilter": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "ReferenceId or -1",
          "description": "Filter to lock onto specific trader by ReferenceId. Set to -1 to scan all contacts. Set to SignalID to lock onto current."
        },
        "SizeX": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "Grid units",
          "description": "Required landing pad X dimension for current contact. -1 if unknown or resolving."
        },
        "SizeZ": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "Grid units",
          "description": "Required landing pad Z dimension for current contact. Check your pad is big enough!"
        },
        "Power": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Returns 1 if dish is powered, 0 otherwise."
        },
        "On": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Power state. Write 1 to turn on, 0 to turn off. Dish only scans when on."
        }
      },
      "memoryDescriptions": {
        "WriteTraderData": {
          "opCode": "WriteTraderData",
          "parameters": "address, value",
          "description": "Writes trading parameters to the satellite dish memory. Used to configure automated trading operations with contacted merchants."
        },
        "StrongestContactIdHash": {
          "opCode": "StrongestContactIdHash",
          "parameters": "none",
          "description": "Returns the ID hash of the strongest signal contact detected by the dish. Use to identify which trader you're communicating with."
        },
        "StrongestContactMetaData": {
          "opCode": "StrongestContactMetaData",
          "parameters": "index",
          "description": "Returns metadata about the strongest contact at the specified index. Contains trader type and capability information."
        },
        "StrongestContactSignalData": {
          "opCode": "StrongestContactSignalData",
          "parameters": "index",
          "description": "Returns signal data for the strongest contact. Includes signal strength, distance, and alignment information."
        },
        "WriteTraderBuyData": {
          "opCode": "WriteTraderBuyData",
          "parameters": "slot, prefabHash, quantity",
          "description": "Configures what items to BUY from the trader. Specify the item's prefab hash and desired quantity."
        },
        "WriteTraderSellData": {
          "opCode": "WriteTraderSellData",
          "parameters": "slot, prefabHash, quantity",
          "description": "Configures what items to SELL to the trader. Specify the item's prefab hash and quantity to sell."
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "genericDescriptions": {
    "logic": {
      "Power": "Returns 1 if device is powered correctly, 0 if not. Most devices require cable connection to power grid.",
      "On": "Current power state. 1 = on, 0 = off. Write to toggle device power via IC10.",
      "Error": "Returns 1 if device is in error state, 0 otherwise. Check device-specific conditions for causes.",
      "Lock": "Lock state. 1 = locked (prevents player interaction), 0 = unlocked. Useful for automation security.",
      "Activate": "Activation state. Usually indicates if device is actively running its primary function.",
      "Open": "Returns 1 if device is open, 0 if closed. Applies to doors, hatches, and containers.",
      "Temperature": "Current temperature reading in Kelvin. 273K = 0°C, 293K = 20°C room temperature.",
      "Pressure": "Current pressure reading in kPa. 101.325 kPa = 1 atmosphere at sea level.",
      "Ratio": "A 0-1 ratio value. Context-specific meaning varies by device.",
      "Quantity": "Total quantity/count on the device. Usually item count in storage.",
      "Charge": "Current electrical charge stored in the device. Typically for batteries.",
      "RequiredPower": "Power draw in watts when device is operating. Idle devices may draw less.",
      "ReferenceId": "Unique identifier for this device instance. Use with db instruction for batch operations.",
      "PrefabHash": "Hash code identifying the device type. Same for all instances of this device.",
      "LineNumber": "Current line being executed on programmable devices. Useful for debugging IC10 scripts.",
      "Horizontal": "Horizontal angle or position. Usually 0-360 degrees for rotational devices.",
      "Vertical": "Vertical angle or position. Usually 0-90 degrees for elevation controls.",
      "Setting": "A configurable value that controls device behavior. Meaning varies by device type."
    },
    "slots": {
      "Battery": "Slot for battery cells. Powers the device when not connected to grid or for portable operation.",
      "ProgrammableChip": "IC10 chip slot. Insert programmed chips to automate device behavior.",
      "GasCanister": "Slot for gas canisters. Provides or stores atmospheric gases.",
      "GasFilter": "Filter slot that restricts gas flow to specific gas types.",
      "SoundCartridge": "Audio cartridge slot for speakers and alarms.",
      "DataDisk": "Data storage disk slot for programs or saved data.",
      "Import": "Input slot for items entering the device for processing.",
      "Export": "Output slot where processed items exit the device.",
      "Ore": "Slot specifically for ore items in mining/processing equipment."
    },
    "versions": {
      "Tier One": "Basic version. Standard efficiency and material costs. Good for early game or backup systems.",
      "Tier Two": "Improved version. Better efficiency, faster operation, reduced resource consumption."
    },
    "memory": {
      "StackPointer": "Returns or sets the current stack pointer position in device memory.",
      "ExecuteRecipe": "Triggers execution of a crafting/processing recipe in the device.",
      "JumpToAddress": "Jumps execution to a specific memory address.",
      "WaitUntilNextValid": "Pauses execution until the next valid condition is met.",
      "JumpIfNextInvalid": "Jumps to address if next instruction would be invalid.",
      "DeviceSetLock": "Sets the lock state of the device programmatically."
    }
  }
}

```
